title: Make all theme extraction limits configurable
body:
## Background

In PR #247, we added `MaxDisputePrinciples` and `MaxPrincipleItems` to `ThemeExtractionConfig` to make principle extraction limits configurable. However, the existing `sanitizePatterns` and `sanitizeConclusions` functions still use package-level constants:

- `maxDisputedPatterns` (constant)
- `maxConclusions` (constant)

This creates an inconsistent configuration model where some limits are configurable and others are not.

## Proposed Change

Add the following fields to `ThemeExtractionConfig`:
- `MaxDisputedPatterns` (default: current constant value)
- `MaxConclusions` (default: current constant value)

Update `sanitizePatterns` and `sanitizeConclusions` to accept config-driven limits, similar to how `sanitizePrinciples` works.

## Files to Modify

- `internal/usecase/review/theme_extractor.go` - Add new config fields
- `internal/adapter/theme/extractor.go` - Thread config into sanitize functions

## Benefits

- Consistent configuration model
- All limits tunable from a single location
- Easier to extend with new extraction types

---

*Originated from code review finding in PR #247*
